entries.reason: Measure review agents by resolved bugs, not comment volume
Automations post corroborates Bugbot's scale and shows how review agents verify output in cloud sandboxes.
Separate guaranteed resources from kill limits in agentic evals
Terminal-Bench 2.1 changes show the benchmark maintainers themselves raised memory, CPU, and timeouts to improve reliability.
Keep session, harness, and sandboxes separate in long-running agents
Let production agents act only inside an approved plan
Ship recap corroborates the plan-plus-permissions model and notes that Vercel Agent stays read-only until it gets narrow temporary permission.
Make tiered reasoning the default model policy
Preview post corroborates max reasoning, ultra subagents, and GPT-5.6 Sol's coding benchmark gains before general availability.
